description_long: This is a heavily armored tracked combat vehicle, resembling a World War II-era tank, with a large rotating turret mounted centrally on its hull. The exterior is covered in a green and brown camouflage pattern, with visible hatches, periscopes, and a prominent main cannon extending from the turret. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, connected by a continuous metal track system, and additional equipment such as spare track links and storage boxes mounted on the hull. A red star insignia and white stenciled markings are visible on the turret, indicating military affiliation. The front of the vehicle is sloped for deflection, and the rear includes exhaust vents and additional stowage. The overall construction appears robust, with thick armor plating and functional details for urban and battlefield environments.
description: A camouflaged, heavily armored tracked tank with a central turret, main cannon, and military insignia. Features include sloped armor, storage equipment, and a robust track system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the tank, six large road wheels, spare track links, and a red star insignia on the turret.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped frontal armor, main cannon, and headlight placements.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible stenciled markings on the turret, track system, and additional storage equipment.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, exhaust vents, and rear armor details.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front; no additional weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped frontal armor, thick turret armor, and reinforced side panels; visually robust and continuous.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Woodland camouflage pattern with irregular green and brown patches and some black accents.
attribute_military_markings: Red star emblem on both sides of the turret; white stenciled numbers and symbols on the turret side.
